briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby RCMP Crime Stats Show Mixed Results for Q3 2025
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council will consider the Burnaby RCMP's quarterly performance report (July–September 2025), which shows theft from vehicles up 45%, break-ins to residences up 59%, and drug trafficking up 123%, while auto theft, fraud, and mail theft all dropped significantly.
briefs.action_required: Review the theft-from-vehicle and break-and-enter trends — consider upgrading your business security now.
